headline: Lowe’s (LOW) Launches AI-Powered Material Lists Tool for Pro Customers
summary: Lowe’s Companies Inc. (NYSE:LOW) is one of the best long term stocks to buy according to hedge funds. On May 21, Lowe’s introduced Material Lists, an AI-powered tool designed to streamline the estimation process for Pro customers. This technology converts various formats (including handwritten notes, photos, and spreadsheets) into quote-ready orders in minutes. Supporting both […]
